user_story: As an HR admin, I want to enable or disable the Orientation Module, so that orientation functionality is available only when my organization needs it
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Setup screen; When I select Yes or No for "Do you want to enable the Orientation Module?"; Then the module is enabled or disabled accordingly

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save the orientation enablement choice, so that my setup decision is persisted
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Setup screen; When I make a selection and click Save; Then the setting is saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save and continue to the next configuration step, so that I can proceed through the orientation setup flow efficiently
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Setup screen; When I make a selection and click Save & Next; Then the setting is saved and I advance to the next step

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to cancel out of the Setup screen, so that I can exit without applying changes
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Setup screen; When I click Cancel; Then I exit the screen without saving
